nasb.text: “Son of man, say to her, ‘You are a land that is not cleansed or rained on in the day of indignation.’

esv.text: “Son of man, say to her, You are a land that is not cleansed or rained upon in the day of indignation.

cnv.text: “人子啊！你要對這地說：‘在忿怒的日子，你是沒有雨水，沒有甘霖之地’。

ccb.text: “人子啊，你要对以色列说，‘在我发怒的日子，将没有雨水滋润你这不洁之地。
